Name: Saint Ann's School
Tagline: Offices UPCOMING EVENT Puppet Parade CLICK FOR DETAILS April 28 @ 1:00 pm ANNOUNCEMENT The 2026-27 school year calendar is available online now.
About: Since its founding in 1965, Saint Ann’s has embraced a commitment to education for its own sake, oriented to the capacities of each individual student and free of the encumbrances of formal grading, prizes, and rankings. At the same time, we are unabashedly committed to excellence in all that we do.
Philosophy: The goal of the history curriculum is to cultivate a genuine, informed and critical enthusiasm for the world through history. We want to ensure that students come to an understanding of how cultures have changed over time and learn how to express themselves both in prose and discussion.
Outcomes: Saint Ann's School boasts impressive Ivy League placements, with many graduates attending top universities such as Harvard, Yale, and Columbia. Alumni have excelled in diverse fields, from arts and sciences to business and public service.
Admissions: I am so happy that you are considering an application to Saint Ann’s. Whether you are the parent of a toddler looking at preschools, or you are a soon-to-be high school student doing your own research, I know that the admissions process in our fair city can be overwhelming, to say the least!
Quote: Celebrate the joy of learning, nurture each unique spirit, and strive for excellence in every endeavor.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Physical fitness is a lifelong objective. Our classes and activities from preschool through twelfth grade reflect this belief, putting substantial emphasis on the idea that the experience should be a joyful one.
Performance.Academic Integration: Saint Ann’s recreational arts curriculum is rooted in the idea of providing a positive, creative, safe environment in which to foster an awareness of the value of physical activity and athletics. We are committed to engaging students in a process that will enhance their lives now and in the future.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: We use team teaching to maximize student-teacher interaction, and we organize the classes according to age. This method provides an opportunity for individualized attention and skill development.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Saint Ann’s Summer Arts is an auxiliary program that takes place on Saint Ann’s campus and its environs and features a variety of offerings in the visual and performing arts, music, computer science, athletics, and more. The program is open to Saint Ann’s students entering grades P3–9 in the fall.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Saint Ann's School graduates have a strong record of acceptance into Ivy League institutions, with approximately 20% attending these prestigious universities annually. Notable alumni include actress Jennifer Connelly and composer Nico Muhly.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Saint Ann's School maintains quality through NYSAIS accreditation and regular ERB testing, complemented by trimester reports and biannual parent-teacher conferences to ensure continuous student progress and personalized feedback.
